Module 4:
Launch List Secrets, Part 1
!
Executive Summary
It’s time to talk about email lists! The list is constantly being mentioned so
now it’s time to dig into it.
Before I even had a website I started building a list. The list has allowed me
to sell tens of millions of dollars in products.
There are two key things that have led to my success:
• 	Focus on building a list
• 	Giving people what they want
Most people never return to the websites they visit. Capturing someone’s
email address is key to this, with their email you can drive them back to
your website.
When it comes to lists, bigger is not always better. Throughout the years,
after all the launches I’ve done and partnerships I’ve developed, I have the
insight into people’s lists. Over and over I’ve seen smaller lists outperform
larger ones.
RFM - Recency, Frequency, Monetary:
• 	How recently someone joined your list
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 2 --

• 	How frequently they bought from you
• 	Monetary is at what transaction size and how much money
We often see that if someone has just recently joined your email list they
are a lot more powerful. Launch lists are like a warm security blanket you
can wrap around you.
As an example, let’s imagine there are four “guru” Internet Marketing
launches: A, B, C, and D. When guru A launches all the other guru’s mail
into his/her prelaunch content and that leads into a launch list.
There is usually a leaderboard to show who’s getting the most sales during
these JV launches. Generally the person who had the most recent launch
performs best for the next JV launch.
This example shows how powerful “recency” is…use it to your advantage.
!
